name: pennylane
description: Reads Pennylane v2 customers, customer invoices, suppliers, supplier invoices, products, categories, transactions, and bank accounts, and writes customer/supplier/product/category mutations through the REST API.

risk.read: external Pennylane API read of accounting data (customers, invoices, suppliers, products, categories, transactions, bank accounts)
risk.write: external mutation; creates/updates company and individual customers, suppliers, products, and analytical categories in Pennylane's accounting ledger
